summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Capacitance and Dielectrics is a key topic in Electrostatics for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of capacitance and dielectrics.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding capacitance and dielectrics has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
